description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine station_pout_2, and is implemented by a call to station_pout_2. Use this API to print power flows in a substation. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.0.0. ierr = station_pout(option, station)

option.description: report the power flows of all substations.
report the power flows of substation STATION.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
